About.title: About ZENTRA
About.p1: ZENTRA is a full‑stack micro‑agency: design, engineering, AI, and long‑term care. We build digital products that stay fast and maintainable over time.
About.p2: We work closely with stakeholders: align on goals, define success criteria, and ship releases tied to clear metrics.
About.card1: Value and flows first—then pixels and code.
About.card2: TypeScript, tests, CI/CD, safe releases, and code review.
About.card3: LLMs, RAG, and automation—only when it truly saves time.

ProcessPage.title: Process
ProcessPage.subtitle: We work in the open: regular demos, clear status, predictable timelines.

ContactPage.subtitle: Tell us what you need to build—we’ll respond within a business day.
